description: Spotify Enhancement + Web Research for Tasks: Upgrade SpotifyMiniPlayer to support custom playlist URLs from settings, add focus playlist suggestions in FocusMode, and add a Research button to the task detail panel that uses AI to research web context for a task.
steps: 1. Modify frontend/components/SpotifyMiniPlayer.tsx to read a custom playlist URL from localStorage key 'chronai-spotify-playlist-url'. If set, use that URL in the Spotify embed iframe src (convert to embed format: open.spotify.com/embed/playlist/...). Fall back to the current default playlist if not set.

2. Modify frontend/components/FocusMode.tsx to add a 'Focus Playlists' suggestion section when Spotify is connected. Show 2-3 curated focus playlist suggestions (lo-fi beats, deep focus, classical focus) with clickable links that set the playlist URL in localStorage and dispatch a storage event for SpotifyMiniPlayer to pick up.

3. Create backend endpoint POST /api/research in backend/app/main.py or a new router backend/app/api/research.py. It should: accept auth_token and task_context (title, notes), use Gemini with grounding/search capabilities (or httpx to fetch search results) to research the web for context relevant to the task. Return an array of result cards with fields: title, summary, source_url, relevance_snippet.
4. Add frontend API function in frontend/lib/api-extended.ts: researchTask(authToken, taskContext) that calls POST /api/research.

5. Create frontend component frontend/components/tasks/TaskResearchPanel.tsx: triggered by a 'Research' button in TaskDetailPanel. Shows loading spinner, then displays expandable cards with source title, summary text, and source URL link. Each card is collapsible.
6. Integrate the Research button and TaskResearchPanel into the TaskDetailPanel in frontend/app/dashboard/tasks/page.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: SpotifyMiniPlayer reads custom playlist URL from localStorage and uses it in the embed iframe
FocusMode shows focus playlist suggestions when Spotify is enabled
Backend POST /api/research endpoint compiles and returns structured research results
TaskResearchPanel renders expandable cards with titles, summaries, and source links
Research button is visible in task detail panel
python -m py_compile on new backend files passes
